name_en: Chanel New Retro Drawstring Bucket Bag 2057-
name_cn:
Chanel New Retro Drawstring Bucket Bag 2057-
Classic quilted pattern and leather chain design
Leather has a sheen, super textured!
Retro black and gold, high-end and atmospheric, stylish yet chic
Inheriting Chanel's elegant style
Size: 21*24*14
